note: Deterministic negative control (owner ruling a). A reasoning model returns HTTP 200 with finish_reason=length and message.content=null because it spent its entire completion budget on reasoning_tokens (completion_tokens == reasoning_tokens) and emitted zero content tokens. The runner MUST record this as UNANALYZABLE-CENSUS (reason_code null-or-empty-content) with full preserved metadata; it MUST NOT parse it, retry it, silently omit it, or assign a substantive grader verdict. Response fields mirror the shape observed in the attempt-#1 crash envelope (raw/ASG-ff571c5eb6ee-rater-b-attempt0.json) with synthetic identifiers only.
